nasb.text: Now he arose that same night and took his two wives and his two maids and his eleven children, and crossed the ford of the Jabbok.

esv.text: The same night he arose and took his two wives, his two female servants, and his eleven children, and crossed the ford of the Jabbok.

cnv.text: 雅各那夜起來，帶著他的兩個妻子、兩個婢女和十一個孩子，都過了雅博渡口。

ccb.text: 那天晚上，雅各起来带着两个妻子、两个婢女和十一个儿子渡过雅博渡口。

csbs.text: 他夜间起来，带着他的两个妻子、两个婢女和十一个孩子，过了雅博浅滩。
